currentState.summary: R99 complete — Pro switch validated (H-avg 5.28, +0.24 vs Flash, 0 errors). CompStrategy all-agents reverted (1.43-pt regression). Streaming eval+judge pipeline working. Behavioral eval blocked by 250 RPD quota.

blueprintPhase: Phase 1 Pro Switch — partially validated (HT done, behavioral blocked by quota)

blockers.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro 250 RPD free tier exhausted. Behavioral eval cannot run same day as host-triangle. Resets ~midnight PT.
blockers.workaround: Retry next day or upgrade to paid tier

nextSteps.description: Run /learning-loop on R97-R99 findings — codify Pro switch learnings, eval methodology, prompt pollution anti-pattern
Run full 109-scenario behavioral eval with FORCE_PRO_MODEL=true (quota resets ~midnight PT)
Fix H9 dispatch routing — add comp keywords to dispatch.py so comp-intent queries go to comp agent
E2E architecture reality check — what's production-ready vs what's dev-only (see handover Tier 1/2/3)
Test GPT-5.3-chat as judge — 5 scenarios, compare vs GPT-5.2

evalInfrastructure.proQuota: 250 RPD free tier — 1 eval set per day max

r99Findings.h9RootCause: Routing problem — comp queries dispatch to host/dining, not comp agent
r99Findings.streamingPipeline: Validated — eval writes per-scenario files, judge scores in real-time
